titleStmt.title: SII 17.491: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 491. (A.R. No. 460 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Tyāgarāja shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Ṛishabha, śu. 11, Monday, Uttiram, regularly correspond to 1262 A.D., May 1.

This records the gift of 24 vēli, 6 mā, and 3 kāṇi of land by Nārāyaṇaṉ of Paḍappai in Malaimaṇḍalam for meeting the expenses for the conduct of a service called Tiruvikkiramaṉ-sandhi on two occasions and for burning three perpetual lamps to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu Uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī 2 tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī[rāje]ntiracoḻa tevarkku yāṇ
ṭu 10 6 vatu ṛṣapanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa
uttirattu nāḷ malaimaṇṭalattu paṭappai nārāyaṇaṉeṉ Uṭaiyaār
tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku tiruvikkaramaṉ cantiyeṉṟu Irucanti Āṭi
yaruḷavum Amutu ceytaruḷavum muṉṟu tirunantā viḷakku Eriyavum ve
ṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Eṉ kāṇiyil kuṭutta rājentiracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu
Iṭaiyaḷa nāṭṭu kāṇiyāy tirunāmattu
kkāṇiyāka kuṭutta Ūṟṟaṅkāl kaṇṭamum naṟuvaṭṭaṇi Āṟ
ṟukku mel karaiyilum kiḻkaraiyilum maṟṟum nilaṅkalantavā
ṟṟāl pottakappaṭi nilam 2 10 4vapatma Innilam Irupattu na(ṉ)āle
āṟumāmukkāṇiyum Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṇo
kkiṉa kiṭaṅkum pākamum parakācirayamum potuvum potuvāva
ṉavum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavu muṭpaṭa tirunāmattukkāṇi
yākak kuṭutteṉ paṭappai nārāyaṇaṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟi
veṉ Ayarāṟṟuc caṉṉiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ paṭappai
yakkaveḷaraṉeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇakku nākamaṅkalamuṭaiUnfinished.
Digital edition of SII 17.491 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
